message.reasoning:
The user wants a JSON response only, following the contract. They are in "prepare_to_edit" phase and need to gather exact evidence needed before editing schema definitions. They have expanded artifacts.rs etc. They need to locate schema version constants. The history shows they previously used session.expand_file and session.hydrate to capture definitions. Now they likely need to read the exact source of constants like RUN_MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION, TASK_SPEC_SCHEMA_VERSION etc. They may need to hydrate those symbols to see their definitions. The strategy wants evidence_acquired before editing. So they likely need to call session.hydrate on each of those symbols to get exact definitions. Could do tool_call session.hydrate with target selectors for those symbols. Which one to hydrate? Probably they need to hydrate RUN_MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION (S18) and TASK_SPEC_SCHEMA_VERSION (S30) etc. The active code windows show artifacts.rs but not the definitions. So they need to read the definitions using session.hydrate. Use one tool call at a time. So kind=tool_call, tool_name="session.hydrate@v1". Payload with target selector for desired symbol. They may need to hydrate multiple, but can only do one tool_call now? The response contract allows tool_call with payload. Probably need to hydrate the RUN_MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION constant. Let's target "symbol:crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs::RUN_MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION". Use selector maybe "symbol:crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs::RUN_MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION". Provide as payload.

Thus produce JSON:

{
  "kind":"tool_call",
  "assistant_message":"Hydrating RUN_MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION definition",
  "tool_call":{"tool_name":"session.hydrate@v1","payload":{"target":"symbol:crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs::RUN_MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION"}},
  "acquired_fact_ids":[],
  "readiness_state":"evidence_acquired"
}

But need to include acquired_fact_ids list with any fact ids obtained? Since we haven't got them yet, maybe empty list. readiness_state could be "evidence_acquired" after tool call? Actually readiness states: not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit. After a tool call, maybe still not ready? But they said after acquiring evidence, readiness_state can be evidence_acquired. So after tool call we may still be not ready to edit, but evidence acquired? Might set "evidence_acquired". Let's set "evidence_acquired". acquired_fact_ids maybe include the fact id of the hydrated symbol? Not known. Could leave empty. They said acquired_fact_ids list of fact ids. Could omit or empty array. Provide empty array.

Thus final JSON.
